monday.notes: Range-setting day after weekend gap. Watch for gap fills.

tuesday.notes: Typically heaviest volume day. API/EIA inventory days for energy.

wednesday.notes: EIA inventory 10:30 ET. FOMC when scheduled 14:00 ET.

thursday.notes: Post-EIA positioning. Weekly jobless claims 08:30 ET.

friday.notes: Position squaring before weekend. NFP first Friday 08:30 ET. REDUCE LEVERAGE before close.

saturday.notes: Extremely thin. Stop hunts common. Monitor only.

sunday.notes: Market reopens 6PM ET. Watch for gap opens.
